title: Import a MS Word Document to a Board Item/Subitems
excerpt:
I was wondering if there was a way to upload a MS Word document and from there create a board/ project items or subitems based on heading or topics written in the word document? 
Similar to importing an Excel sheet where…

posts.author: kkyaw (Kristen)
posts.cookedHtml:
I was wondering if there was a way to upload a MS Word document and from there create a board/ project items or subitems based on heading or topics written in the word document?

Similar to importing an Excel sheet where the Board and Project Topics are taken from the Excel Sheet. I was wondering if there is something like that for a Word document?

Thank you!

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @kkyaw ,
Could you please describe a bit your use case? Why do you need it?

posts.author: danielball (Daniel Ball)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @kkyaw . I have just released an app that lets you create monday docs from Word Documents (see Word Import - monday.com Marketplace). For tabular data, it currently creates tables in monday docs but I could just as well set it up to create embedded boards instead. Would this interest you?
